questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the chore chart.
Monday: take out trash (Emir)
Tuesday: do dishes (Defne)
Wednesday: vacuum floor (Emir)
Question: Which chore belongs to Defne?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Chart'ta Defne için do dishes yazıyor.
